productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Brown Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather slippers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair of slippers and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperBrown supple leather straps in a criss-cross pattern over the midfoot for absolute style and to hold the foot in placeVelcro closure on the lateral side strap to further customise the Fit at the midfoot Fabric inner lining for the straps for absolute sweat-free comfort Leather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with modified herringbone pattern grooves on the forefoot and heel to offer absolute grip Boat shaped outsole for a more natural foot movementshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
